{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260324121636A253208E405904F4CEB5\"}"},"total":2},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7351572326563234584","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常适合刚入职的人阅读，如果马上毕业准备进入职场，看一下有益无害"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1711676624,"group_id":"7348020889864129561","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"将对社会的思考融入到重生穿越小说当中，希望用文字唤醒更多人。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyZ4cMNxEu6taK1qrBG6+i4=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"108313364523","user_name":"卿宇不凡"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"108313364523","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7348020889864129561","book_info":{"abstract":"本书主要是适合应届毕业生、刚参加工作不到3年的职场新人。内容通俗易懂，主要是讲述职场心得和经验技巧，非常适合职场新人直接用在工作中。书中列举的职场经验不是鸡汤，是从真实工作中总结提炼出来的。\n如果你即将开始找工作，可以阅读此书，提前涉猎一些职场经验，有益无害；如果你正在找工作，可以运用书里的经验技巧，防止入职后又觉得不合适；如果你正在试用期内，可以帮助你快速获得领导的认可；如果你频繁离职，一直找不到合适的工作，那更有必要阅读此书，按照本书讲的经验技巧，尝试改变自己，或许就能改变现在的困境，找到一份满意的工作。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o5d2ec28cdad602dd59e06509b625eecc~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"A蛮是个妖精","author_id":"","book_id":"7348020889864129561","book_name":"职场菜鸟生存法则","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#28a090","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":31,\"name\":\"其他\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=31\u0026name=其他\u0026genre_type=0\
